message:
🐛 Fix cards showing blank content before data loads (#494)

Fixed a timing issue where cards would show blank content for several seconds
before data appeared. The root cause was in the cache layer:

- When `persist=true`, the cache was initialized with `isLoading=false`
  assuming cached data existed
- If no cached data was in IndexedDB, `isLoading` was already false
  before the fetch even started
- This caused cards to render their "data view" with empty arrays,
  showing blank content instead of skeleton

The fix ensures `isLoading` stays `true` until either:
1. Cached data is found in IndexedDB (then show data + refresh spinner)
2. The fetch completes (success or failure)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
